mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, content_summary, symptom_summary, root_cause_summary, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket_knowledge WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_knowledge SET content = #{content}, content_summary = #{contentSummary}, symptom_summary = #{symptomSummary}, root_cause_summary = #{rootCauseSummary}, resolution_steps = #{resolutionSteps}, risk_notes = #{riskNotes}, applicable_scope = #{applicableScope}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
